name: Kettlebell Figure 8 Tactical Clean Complex
description: A single kettlebell complex combining a figure 8 pass with a tactical clean, performed for time with progressively heavier kettlebell weights.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Figure 8 Tactical Clean
exercises.description: Start in a hike position with the kettlebell. Pass the kettlebell between the legs, around the outside of one leg, then clean it to the rack position on the opposite side. Return to the hike position and repeat on the other side.
exercises.notes: Maintain a strong core and hinge at the hips. Keep the kettlebell close to the body during the clean. Focus on smooth transitions and control throughout the figure 8 movement.

sequence.flow: Perform the Kettlebell Figure 8 Tactical Clean for the specified duration in each round, progressively increasing the kettlebell weight.
sequence.notes: Round 1: 2:00 with a medium kettlebell. Round 2: 1:30 with a medium-heavy kettlebell. Round 3: 1:00 with a heavy kettlebell. Round 4: 0:30 with the heaviest kettlebell. Rest 1:00 between each round.

textOverlays: SINGLE KETTLEBELL COMPLEX: FIGURE 8 TACTICAL CLEAN
THE TACTICAL COMPONENT PROVIDES A GREAT OPPORTUNITY TO WORK WITH A HEAVIER BELL
OUR WORKOUT IN THE KETTLECLUB PROGRAM TODAY:
raw.visualSummary: A woman in athletic wear demonstrates a kettlebell exercise called the Figure 8 Tactical Clean. She performs the movement barefoot on a black mat in a home gym setting. The exercise involves passing a blue kettlebell between her legs in a figure-8 motion and then cleaning it to the rack position, alternating sides. Text overlays describe the exercise and a structured workout plan with varying durations and kettlebell weights.
